title: Creamy Crunchy Greek Cheonggukjang Moussaka
description: A winey and springy Greek dish featuring cheonggukjang, perfect for a brunch mood, made with whole30-friendly ingredients in a moussaka form
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Render the lardons in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked ground lamb, cheonggukjang, red wine, and tomato paste, and mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Dip each eggplant slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides, then place in a baking dish.
Spread a layer of the lamb and cheonggukjang mixture over the eggplant slices.
Sprinkle a layer of crumbled feta cheese over the top.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake the moussaka in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
